mapper.sql: code.group_code, code.code, code.code_name, code.use_yn, code.description, code.sort_index, code.reg_date, code.mod_date, code.reg_user_key, code.mod_user_key
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO common_code (group_code, code, code_name, use_yn, description, sort_index, reg_date, mod_date, reg_user_key, mod_user_key) VALUES (#{groupCode}, #{code}, #{codeName}, #{useYn}, #{description}, #{sortIndex}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{regUserKey}, #{regUserKey})
